qa_pairs.question: What is the default home directory quota for a user on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the TamIA cluster, each user has a home directory quota of 25 GB.

qa_pairs.question: Is the home directory on TamIA backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the home directory on TamIA is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: Are home directories on TamIA accessible from both login and compute nodes?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, home directories on TamIA are accessible from both login nodes and compute nodes.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for CIFAR AI Chairs on TamIA?
qa_pairs.answer: CIFAR AI Chairs on TamIA are allocated 2 TB of scratch space per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on TamIA?
qa_pairs.answer: AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on TamIA are allocated 1 TB of scratch space per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for faculty members within an AI program on TamIA?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members within an AI program on TamIA are allocated 500 GB of scratch space per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the scratch space quota for faculty members applying AI to other domains on TamIA?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members applying AI to other domains on TamIA are allocated 500 GB of scratch space per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the expiration time for files stored in the scratch space on TamIA?
qa_pairs.answer: Files stored in the scratch space on TamIA have an expiration time of 2 months.

qa_pairs.question: Is the scratch space on TamIA backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the scratch space on TamIA is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: Can scratch space on TamIA be accessed from login nodes and compute nodes?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, scratch space on TamIA can be accessed from both login nodes and compute nodes.

qa_pairs.question: Does the home directory on TamIA have an expiration time for files?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the home directory on TamIA does not have an expiration time for files.
